title: WebApplication
description: Web application configuration including redirect URIs

redirectUris.description: URIs to which Microsoft Entra ID will redirect after authentication

homePageUrl.description: Home page URL of the application

logoutUrl.description: URL used by the authorization service to sign out the user

implicitGrantSettings.description: Settings for implicit grant flow tokens

enableIdTokenIssuance.description: Whether ID tokens can be issued using the implicit flow

enableAccessTokenIssuance.description: Whether access tokens can be issued using the implicit flow
